Project Based Learning: The objective of project based learning is to strengthen the understanding of students' fundamentals through effective application of theoretical concepts. Projects can help to boost students' skills and widen the horizon of their thinking. The ultimate aim of an engineering student is to resolve a problem by applying theoretical knowledge. In the beginning, students shall be given an awareness and/or guideline on how to implement and learn this course through a project and form groups in the first few weeks. Each group should identify a project that can be done to understand a part of the contents of this course and perform a literature survey. Choose a suitable platform for your application and the input output devices to be interfaced. Develop the block diagram and present before the jury within first month after the commencement of classes. Implement necessary hardware and software to develop the prototype. Prepare a report and present before the jury for final evaluation
